root.name: Replace 'Click to add text' placeholder on slide 8 with 'Elevator movement controls aircraft pitch attitude'
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly replaced the specified placeholder text on slide 8 with the target text, and did not introduce extraneous or destructive changes.

children.name: Correct Replacement of Placeholder Text
children.description: Checks that the 'Click to add text' placeholder was present and was replaced with the target text on slide 8.

children.name: Slide 8 Content Verification
children.description: Verifies that slide 8 contains the new text 'Elevator movement controls aircraft pitch attitude' and that the placeholder text is no longer present.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    from pptx import Presentation
    import re
    target_slide_no = 8
    target_text = 'Elevator movement controls aircraft pitch attitude'
    placeholder_text = 'Click to add text'
    
    prs = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    if len(prs.slides) < target_slide_no:
        return f"Presentation only has {len(prs.slides)} slides.", 0.0
    slide = prs.slides[target_slide_no-1]
    all_texts = '\n'.join([shape.text.strip() for shape in slide.shapes if hasattr(shape, 'text')])
    replaced = target_text in all_texts
    placeholder_gone = placeholder_text not in all_texts
    if replaced and placeholder_gone:
        return "Target text present, placeholder removed.", 1.0
    elif replaced:
        return "Target text present, but placeholder still present.", 0.5
    elif placeholder_gone:
        return "Placeholder removed, but target text not present.", 0
    else:
        return "Target text not present, placeholder still present.", 0.0

children.reason: Placeholder removed, but target text not present.

The criterion received a failing score because while the placeholder text "Click to add text" was successfully removed from slide 8, the required target text "Elevator movement controls aircraft pitch attitude" was not added in its place. This represents an incomplete task execution where only half of the replacement process was completed. Since the slide verification shows the target content is missing, the fundamental requirement of replacing placeholder text with specific content was not met.

root.reason: The criterion received a failing score because the agent only completed half of the required task. While it successfully removed the "Click to add text" placeholder from slide 8, it failed to add the specified replacement text "Elevator movement controls aircraft pitch attitude" in its place. Since the correct replacement of placeholder text was marked as critical and this fundamental requirement wasn't met, the overall criterion failed despite the agent performing well on the non-critical aspects like avoiding extraneous changes to other slides and animations.
